escalation.rationale: US-Israel war with Iran escalates with strikes on nuclear facilities, energy infrastructure attacks across Gulf states, and threats of ground invasion.

ticker_items: Israel strikes Iran's Natanz nuclear facility, no radioactive leakage reported
Iran threatens global tourism sites as war enters day 20
US F-35 damaged by Iranian fire in first combat loss
Netanyahu says ground component needed for Iran war victory

new_entrant.text: Ukraine has deployed military units to five Middle Eastern countries to help intercept drones according to security council secretary.

middle_east.description: Israel launched new wave of strikes targeting infrastructure of Iranian regime in Tehran.
Iranian military struck targets in West Jerusalem according to IRGC statement.
Iranian military struck targets in Haifa according to IRGC statement.
Attack on nuclear facility with no reported radioactive material leakage
Fresh wave of strikes on Iranian capital as part of ongoing bombardment
Drone strike near Iraqi intelligence headquarters kills one police officer

claimed_totals.claim: US military deaths in Iran war
Gulf states deaths in Iran war

claimed_totals.figure: 1,444 Iranian dead, 18 Israeli dead, 13 US soldiers, 21 Gulf states

ukraine.text: Ukraine has deployed military units to five Middle Eastern countries to help protect critical and civilian infrastructure against drones
ukraine.speaker: Rustem Umerov
ukraine.title: Ukrainian Security Council Secretary

middle_east.text: We are winning and Iran is being decimated
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Israeli Prime Minister

middle_east.text: Trump says no ceasefire as Khamenei issues defiant message
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: There has to be a ground component
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Israeli Prime Minister

observers.description: Prime Minister Takaichi told President Trump that Japan is ready to contribute to Strait of Hormuz safety while explaining Tokyo's legal constraints. Japan expressing readiness for 'appropriate' efforts to secure passage through the key waterway as Middle East conflict threatens to spin out of control.

Russia and Iran deepening military alliance with Moscow providing Iran advanced satellite imagery, drone upgrades and tactical battlefield insights. Intelligence-sharing enhances Tehran's precision strikes against US forces in Middle East, mirroring US support for Ukraine.

Denmark was reportedly ready to blow up Greenland runways if US invaded, with Danish soldiers sent to Arctic island in January also given blood supplies in case of combat. Reveals tensions over Greenland amid broader geopolitical shifts.

French military operational security compromised when soldier revealed aircraft carrier location in Mediterranean through workout app. France offering post-ceasefire assistance for Strait of Hormuz security alongside Italy and Germany.
Indian Navy planning evacuation of ships from Persian Gulf with naval escorts through Strait of Hormuz to secure energy supplies and protect against economic fallout.

financial.notes: Iran war continues to roil global energy markets as attacks on Gulf energy infrastructure escalate supply crisis concerns.

update_log.text: Iran says US and Israel attacked Natanz nuclear facility with no radioactive leakage reported
Drone strike near Iraqi intelligence headquarters in Baghdad kills one police officer
Israel launches fresh wave of strikes on Tehran as Netanyahu claims Iran being decimated
US F-35 stealth fighter makes emergency landing after being damaged by Iranian fire
Al Jazeera reports Iran war day 21 with Trump rejecting ceasefire and Khamenei issuing defiant message
IRGC announces Iranian military struck targets in West Jerusalem and Haifa
IDF launches wave of strikes targeting Iranian regime infrastructure in Tehran
US F-35 stealth fighter reportedly sustained damage during Iran mission, made emergency landing
